title: Assistance Scheme for Second Timers (Divorced/ Widowed Parents) (ASSIST)
text:
Assistance Scheme for Second Timers (Divorced/ Widowed Parents) (ASSIST) - SupportGoWhere
Assistance Scheme for Second Timers (Divorced/ Widowed Parents) (ASSIST)
Share link
Allocates up to 5% of flats for eligible divorced or widowed parents applying for 2-room Flexi and 3-room BTO flats.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
5% of 2-room Flexi and 3-room Build-To-Order (BTO) flats allocated for eligible applicants
Collapse all sections
About this support

Up to 5% of 2-room Flexi and 3-room BTO flats in non-mature estates are allocated to eligible applicants.

Who is this for?

Divorced or widowed with at least one child (i.e. natural offspring from a legal marriage or legally adopted) aged 18 or below

Adoptive parents must have the Adoption Order of their children when applying for a flat

Must not have any interest in a HDB flat or private residential property after divorce / separation or spouse's demise, except for matrimonial flat / property

How to apply?

Obtain a HDB Flat Eligibility (HFE) letter through the HDB Flat Portal

If you meet the eligibility criteria during your HFE letter application, you may apply for this scheme in your flat application

Where can I find help?

View more details

HDB Hotline: 6866-3066

Submit an enquiry

Scheme last updated 22 May 2026
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
